Welcome to the 2026 IDEA


Email notifications for all Round 1 entrants will go out by 5 pm ET on April 17, 2026.

Round 2 entry period: April 17 through May 4, 2026.

The International Design Excellence Awards (IDEA) is an annual competition presented by the Industrial Designers Society of America (IDSA) that recognizes excellence in design across various disciplines.
